headline: Wrongful Death Lawsuit Puts Atmos Energy Safety And Earnings Outlook In Focus
summary: A wrongful death lawsuit has been filed against Atmos Energy (NYSE:ATO) and other parties after a major gas explosion destroyed a Dallas apartment complex. The incident resulted in multiple fatalities and has triggered legal scrutiny of Atmos Energy's safety practices. The case raises questions about potential operational, regulatory, and reputational risks for the utility. Atmos Energy is a large U.S. natural gas utility that supplies residential, commercial, and industrial customers...
